title: ATP Star Tommy Haas Joins Ownership Group of the San Diego Stingrays, a Pro Padel League Franchise
text: Former ATP World Tour #2 Singles Player and BNP Paribas Open Tournament Director, Tommy Haas, has been named a Team Owner of the San Diego Stingrays. SAN DIEGO, March 17, 2023 /PRNewswire-PRWeb/ — Today, the Pro Padel League (PPL) – North America’s first professional Padel league – is excited to announce that former ATP World […]...

title: PPL Corporation (PPL) to Gain From Domestic Focus, Investment
text: PPL Corporation (PPL) is expected to benefit from its ongoing capital investments and completed acquisitions.
